title: SME Relationship Manager (SME | Financial Institution ) | CSPGF02
description:
Role: SME Relationship Manager

This is a perm hire role for one of our client in the Financial Institution

Work Location: Bugis Area
Salary Range: $3,000-$7,000

Job Scope

  • As Relationship Manager, you will play a crucial role in managing and cultivating relationships with clients as well as take on responsibilities for sourcing clients and driving revenue growth.
  • This role provides a unique opportunity for career advancement, with the potential for grooming into a various positions within the Finance industry.
  • As you demonstrate dedication, proficiency, and a proactive approach, you will be exposed to learning experiences and mentorship that contribute to your professional development.
  • This growth path aligns with our commitment to nurturing talent from within the organization.


Job Description

  • Develop and initiate sales strategies to acquire new clients and grow the business in contract/project financing, pre and post factoring.
  • Actively source and identify good leads for the Relationship officers for prospecting
  • Constantly strive to achieve the sales target and generate revenue growth
  • Provide guidance to the Relationship manager to perform cold callings, manage leads generated by referral agents.
  • Meet potential prospects to assess their needs and work out viable financing solutions
  • Perform credit assessment on client applications to ensure client meets basic credit requirement and compliant with business operational processes and controls.
  • Able to write credit memo on the proposed financing solution to submit to the credit committee and management for approval.
  • Manage and service a portfolio of clients and build strong relationship with the clients to ensure high level of satisfaction
  • Work with the operations and accounts team to ensure that funds are disbursed on timely basis to clients
  • Network with referral agents and business associations/counterparts to build strong relationship to ensure they constantly refer meaningful leads to the company


Skills & Educational Requirements

  • Minimum 5 years of experience working in a financial institution or similar experience in the lending industry
  • Have at least 5 years of experience in Sales & Marketing
  • Have experience in project/contract financing, trade financing, invoice receivables financing and factoring will be an added advantage
  • Have good standard of credit evaluation and financial analysis
  • Highly motivated and dynamic personality to guide and lead a team
  • Demonstrate maturity and confidence in handling difficult situations
  • Ability to work independently and adaptable to changes
  • Possess good skills in networking and business acumen
  • Good interpersonal and communication skills (both verbal and written) and able to interact with people at all levels.
  • High integrity, adept at communicating with individuals at all organizational levels, and open-minded with a determined work ethics.
  • Hard-working and diligence in carrying out responsibilities.
  • A Goal Go-Getter to achieve objectives and meet targets.
  • Hungry to Succeed in their role.
  • An enthusiastic learner to acquire new knowledge and skills.
  • Excellent communication and listening skill


Interested applicants, please click "APPLY NOW"

We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
By submitting your personal data and/or resume, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal
information to prospective employers for their consideration.

Joselito | EA Reg No: R25126580

We are a group of recruiters and HR professionals with combined recruitment and HR experience of more than 60 years in our industries.


We fully understand the pain points of the hiring process and the challenges hiring managers face.


We aspire not only to connect the most suitable candidates to our clients but also to help the candidates grow their careers with our clients.


The synergies among our top recruiters, market intelligence and HR expertise help us deliver market-leading results for our clients and candidates.


Ultimately, we aim to provide the best-fit candidates who will have a STORIED CAREER with our clients
